tasks.label: Deploy (Remote SCP)
tasks.command: set -a && source .env && set +a && JAR=$(ls -t build/libs/seedgg-*.jar | head -1) && JARNAME=$(basename "$JAR") && DPATH="${DEPLOY_PATH%/}" && scp "$JAR" "$DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST:/tmp/$JARNAME" && ssh -t "$DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST" "sudo find $DPATH -maxdepth 1 -name 'seedgg-*.jar' -delete && sudo mv /tmp/$JARNAME $DPATH/ && sudo chown $DEPLOY_OWNER $DPATH/$JARNAME && sudo minecraft-paper recreate"
